item.title: Allergens (full list)
item.description: Allergens: 1. Gluten 2. Eggs 3. Fish 4. Peanuts 5. Crustaceans 6. Milk 7. Soy 8. Sesame 9. Nuts 10. Celery 11. Mustard 12. Lupine 13. Sulphur dioxide 14. Molluscs 15. Garlic

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Sprout Lunch Menu: Our daily meal salad rich in seasonal vegetables with a choice of protein

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Homebound Lunch Menu: Tarte á l’oignon – classic French onion tort with deliciously caramelizedonion, topped with spinach and Gruyere cheese, and a fresh bitter salad on theside. Hereto red wine vinaigrette on the side (1+6+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 - Globetrotter Lunch Menu: GREEN DISH: gyoza with pea protein and vegetables, served with cabbage and jasminerice, topped with spring onion. Hereto chili sauce and gyoza sauce (1+7+8+13+15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB3 - Lunch Menu: Butter beans as purée and boiled, with tomatoes tossed in yoghurt and cardamomwith shallots, topped with crispy fried green split peas (6) (15)

item.title: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB2 - Lunch Menu: Creamy yellow lentil dahl with coconut milk, cauliflower and spinach. Toppedwith tahini yogurt, toasted seeds and kernels, and fresh herbs.

item.title: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu:
item.description: 🍽 HUB1 – Kays - Lunch Menu: Aloo Masoor Dal: Red lentil and potato curry with belugalentils, served with jeera rice (also as brown rice), topped with spicednamkeen. Hereto lime and cucumber raita (15)
